Compare it with Data Augmentation with Mosaic
Ignore the taxonomy
Jump only to the next term
blocks.explanation: MPT (Mosaic) is easiest to understand by comparing it with Data Augmentation with Mosaic, since neighbors expose overlap, difference, and boundary conditions.
